blocks.text: Glimt in Milan — Norway stands on the edge of history
Bodø/Glimt arrive in Milan holding a 3-1 aggregate lead that would have seemed fantasy in August. Norwegian football has never reached the last 16 of the Champions League. Tonight it might.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) represents MANA vs 100 Thieves, DraculaN S5
